notes: Big telemetry upgrade: ~95 iRacing SDK channels — suspension, FFB & clipping, tire wear, per-wheel brake pressure, weather & CarSetup per stint, and rig detection. Additive: older laps are unaffected.
notas: Grande upgrade de telemetria: ~95 canais do SDK do iRacing — suspensao, FFB e clipping, desgaste de pneu, pressao de freio por roda, clima e CarSetup por stint, e deteccao de rig. Aditivo: voltas antigas ficam intactas.
